attestation.statement: Registered pharmacist (KL) reviewed and attests the seed records in this dataset — NTI drugs + therapeutic intervals, renal eGFR thresholds, drug-drug interactions (mechanism-class), allergy cross-reactivity groups, and AU (SUSMP) scheduling — as clinically appropriate for the PharmCheck deterministic engine. Clinical sign-off only (in-session, 2026-07-13). NOT patient-facing: regulatory (TGA) sign-off and FL-30 Step 5 staging validation remain required; dataset_version stays dev-tagged until those clear.
